testcase.name: test_chat_ai
testcase.failure: tests/test_tasklocal.py:125: in test_chat_ai assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI error: Failed to start streaming completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stripe_checkout
testcase.failure: tests/test_tasklocal.py:137: in test_stripe_checkout assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Stripe error: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
